keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY EXTERNAL THROAT. External throat : Bell., Lyc. External throat, right : Caust., Flu-ac., Lyc., Merc., Nat-c., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Sil. External throat, left : Asaf., Calc-c., Con., Sul. External throat, alternating sides : Am-m., Calc-p. External throat, glands of (goitre, etc.) : Am-m., Ars., Bar-c., Bell., Brom., Calc-c., Calc-f., Calc-io., Calc-p., Cham., Grap., Ign., Iod., Kali-c., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Rhus-t., Sil., Spo., Stap., Sul. External throat, glands of (goitre, etc.), right : Ars., Kali-c., Merc., Nit-ac., Sil. External throat, parotitis : Merc., Phyt., Rhus-t. External throat, sensitive to touch, pressure, clothes, etc. : Ant-t., Ap., Lac-c., Lach., Merc-c., Nux-v. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
